mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category_subcategories WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM category_subcategories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category_subcategories WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category_subcategories (category_id, code, name, icon, sort_order, is_active) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive})
mapper.update:
UPDATE category_subcategories
name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE category_subcategories SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
